lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition. It is mechanically sound with minor wear. The exterior and interior show light signs of use but have been well-maintained.
This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor wear on the interior and exterior and is in reliable running order. It has been well-maintained.

Experience the perfect balance of performance and comfort with this well-maintained vehicle! Currently in good condition, it has been consistently cared for and is ready for its next adventure. You'll love the smooth handling and dependable features that make every drive a pleasure. This is a fantastic opportunity to own a reliable car that still has plenty of life and spirit!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owner. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper typical for its age. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; the leather seats show some light creasing but no tears or significant wear. Mechanically, the car is solid, with a complete service history and no known issues. It drives smoothly and provides a reliable, comfortable experience for its next owner.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts as expected. While the exterior shows some minor signs of normal wear, such as a few small paint chips and light scratches, the body remains straight and free of major dents. The interior is clean and comfortable, with only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster. It comes with a consistent service history and has recently undergone a routine inspection. It's a solid, dependable car that is ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a superior acquisition for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved exterior, the automobile offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Our exhaustive multi-point inspection ensures that performance remains optimal, providing the next owner with a reliable and sophisticated transport solution. We invite you to evaluate this distinguished offering, which balances exceptional value with enduring quality.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my reliable daily driver. It's been such a fantastic car for me and is in really great shape! It’s super clean, runs smoothly, and is totally ready for its next adventure. If you're looking for something dependable and well-loved, this is the one for you. I've taken good care of it and I'm sure you'll love it too. Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it!

Available is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six. This unit displays excellent compression across all cylinders with a recently overhauled VANOS system ensuring precise variable valve timing. The high-revving naturally aspirated mill is mated to a crisp 6-speed manual transmission, delivering torque through a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis benefits from reinforced subframe mounting points and upgraded polyurethane bushings, mitigating common floor pan fatigue while sharpening turn-in response. Cosmetically honest with minor patina, this driver’s example prioritizes tactile feedback and longitudinal performance.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Mechanically sound.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a prime example of its model year. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of major blemishes, while the dashboard and all electronic components function exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is robust and reliable. It boasts a comprehensive service history, including a recent oil change and a full multi-point inspection completed just last month. The tires have excellent tread remaining, and the braking system is sharp and responsive. This is a turn-key vehicle perfect for a buyer who appreciates a car that has been treated with genuine care and consistent upkeep.

This vehicle presents a premier opportunity for the astute buyer, characterized by its consistent maintenance history and robust mechanical condition. Both the interior and exterior remain in commendable form, reflecting a standard of care that ensures long-term reliability and comfort. We invite you to experience a vehicle that delivers sophisticated performance and professional utility without compromise.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, it offers a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term value. Each component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and passenger comfort. Experience the assurance of a vehicle that has been preserved with care and remains prepared for immediate, reliable service.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily trips. It's got plenty of life left and is ready for its next adventure with you. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through its six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from documented subframe reinforcement, while the variable M differential lock ensures optimal power delivery through the rear wheels. Recent preventative maintenance includes a VANOS overhaul and a comprehensive valve adjustment to ensure the valvetrain operates within factory tolerances. While the exterior finish shows minor road-going patina consistent with its age, the mechanical integrity is high, offering the visceral, high-revving driving experience that modern electronically-assisted steering simply cannot replicate.
Used car. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Runs well. Price is firm.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior shines with a deep luster, showing only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin where the premium upholstery remains supple and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system—operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and preventative maintenance. Equipped with a fresh set of tires and responsive brakes, this car offers a tight, confident driving experience. It’s a reliable, eye-catching example that is truly turn-key and ready for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained specimen that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic refinement. This vehicle has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure peak performance and long-term durability. Offering a sophisticated driving experience at an exceptional market valuation, this unit represents a premier acquisition for the informed buyer who prioritizes both quality and value.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophisticated engineering. This exceptional example has been preserved to a high standard, offering a seamless blend of performance and comfort for the discerning driver. With its robust mechanical integrity and a well-appointed interior, this vehicle represents a superior investment for those who demand quality and lasting value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. It runs smoothly and looks great—you’re going to love how it handles! Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp with a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. Equipped with a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable differential lock, it offers exceptional mechanical engagement. The chassis remains taut with upgraded bushings and a reinforced rear subframe to address common floor pan fatigue. Recent maintenance includes a VANOS overhaul and valve clearance adjustment, ensuring the individual throttle bodies provide crisp throttle response. Riding on staggered Style 67 wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber, this driver-focused machine balances analog
Used vehicle. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear.

This meticulously maintained luxury sedan offers a refined driving experience and a professional aesthetic. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only minor cosmetic imperfections, such as small stone chips on the front bumper and a light scuff on the rear passenger-side wheel, consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; the premium leather seats are supple and well-preserved, showing only slight softening on the driver's bolster. Every feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the advanced navigation system, is in perfect working order. Mechanically, the car is robust, featuring a complete service history from authorized dealerships. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change, new cabin filters, and a brake inspection confirming plenty of life remaining. The tires provide excellent grip with significant tread depth. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that has been treated with genuine pride of ownership, ideal for someone seeking quality and longevity without the new-car price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a distinguished choice for the discerning driver. Demonstrating a consistent history of care, the mechanical and aesthetic components remain in robust condition, ensuring both reliability and performance. We invite you to experience the refined engineering and enduring quality of this exceptional offering, now available at a competitive market valuation.

This exceptional vehicle serves as a testament to engineering longevity and diligent ownership. Presenting in commendable condition, it features a robust powertrain and a well-preserved interior, ensuring a seamless transition for its next proprietor. Experience the intersection of prestige and reliability with this meticulously inspected offering.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a reliable car without that 'brand new' price tag. Everything runs smoothly, and it’s totally ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Offering a mechanically sorted E46 M3 powered by the high-revving S54 inline-six. This example features a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and has received critical preventative maintenance, including VANOS servicing and rear subframe reinforcement. The engine pulls strongly to its 8,000 RPM redline, benefiting from individual throttle bodies and a tuned exhaust note. Handling is sharpened by a refreshed suspension setup and a functional M-variable limited-slip
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Runs well. Clean title.

This vehicle strikes an excellent balance between performance and daily utility, presenting in well-maintained condition throughout. The exterior paint retains a deep, glossy finish, though a discerning buyer will notice minor stone chips on the front bumper and a small superficial scratch on the rear passenger door, consistent with careful road use. Inside, the smoke-free cabin is remarkably clean; the leather seating is supple and free of tears, showing only light creasing on the driver’s bolster. All onboard electronics, including the navigation system and premium audio setup, function perfectly. Mechanically, this car is robust. It has followed a strict maintenance schedule, with a recent fluid service and brake pad replacement already completed. The engine pulls strongly without hesitation, and the transmission provides smooth, predictable shifts. With four matching tires showing significant tread remaining, this car is turn-key ready for its next owner who values a blend of reliability

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a rigorous professional inspection, this unit demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. It serves as an ideal choice for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience. This vehicle stands as a testament to our commitment to quality and transparency, offering a sophisticated ownership opportunity.
